name: testbench-extension
description: A Visual Studio Code extension for TestBench.

testbenchExtension.automaticLoginAfterEx.description: If enabled, the extension will automatically attempt to log in to the TestBench server using the last used connection after the extension is activated.

testbenchExtension.testBenchLogger.description: Sets the minimum log level for the extension. Logs are saved in the log folder inside the .testbench directory in the workspace location.

testbenchExtension.UseConfigurationFile.description: If enabled, testbench2robotframework will prioritize the settings specified in the pyproject.toml over those specified in the extension settings.

testbenchExtension.cleanFilesBeforeTestG.description: Deletes all files present in the output directory before new test suites are created.

testbenchExtension.fullyQualifiedKeyword.description: Option to call Robot Framework keywords by their fully qualified name in the generated test suites.

testbenchExtension.outputDirectory.description: Directory or ZIP archive containing the generated test suites. The path is relative to the workspace location.

testbenchExtension.compoundInteractionLo.description: Mode for logging compound TestBench interactions.

testbenchExtension.logSuiteNumbering.description: Enables logging of the test suite numbering.

testbenchExtension.resourceDirectoryPath.description: Directory containing the Robot Framework resource files. The path is relative to the workspace location.

testbenchExtension.libraryMarker.description: Marker that can be used to identify TestBench Subdivisions that correspond to Robot Framework libraries. Subdivisions that end with this marker will be considered as Robot Framework libraries.

testbenchExtension.libraryRoot.description: TestBench root subdivision which's direct children correspond to Robot Framework resources.

testbenchExtension.resourceMarker.description: Marker that can be used to identify TestBench Subdivisions that correspond to Robot Framework resources. Subdivisions that end with this marker will be considered as Robot Framework resources.

testbenchExtension.resourceRoot.description: TestBench root subdivision which's direct children correspond to Robot Framework resources.

testbenchExtension.libraryMapping.markdownDescription:
Optional mapping of TestBench Subdivisions to Robot Framework libraries. Must be specified in the format:
`<TestBench Subdivision Name>:<Robot Framework Library import>`

testbenchExtension.resourceMapping.markdownDescription:
Optional mapping of TestBench Subdivisions to Robot Framework resources. Must be specified in the format:
`<TestBench Subdivision Name>:<Robot Framework Resource import>.`

testbenchExtension.outputXmlFilePath.description: The relative file path where the output XML file (Robotframework test results) is stored. If not set, the extension will prompt the user to select a output.xml file location when importing results to testbench server. The path is relative to the workspace location. Used for importing the test results to the TestBench Server.

testbenchExtension.clearInternalTestbenc.description: Delete all files excluding the log files inside the working directory called .testbench before generating tests.

testbenchExtension.openTestingViewAfterG.description: If enabled, the testing view will be opened automatically after test generation is completed.

testbenchExtension.clearReportAfterProce.description: Remove the report file automatically after processing it.

commands.title: Read Tests & Import Results To Testbench
Set Text Filter
commands.when: view == testbench.projects || view == testbench.testThemes || view == testbench.testElements

commands.title: Toggle Filter Diff Mode for Projects
Toggle Filter Diff Mode for Projects
Toggle Filter Diff Mode for Test Themes
Toggle Filter Diff Mode for Test Themes
Toggle Filter Diff Mode for Test Elements
Toggle Filter Diff Mode for Test Elements
Clear All Filters
commands.when: view == testbench.projects || view == testbench.testThemes || view == testbench.testElements

view/item/context.when: view == testbench.testThemes && (viewItem == 'TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'customRoot.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'customRoot.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForGeneration.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForGeneration.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForGeneration.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForGeneration.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile')

view == testbench.testThemes && (viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestThemeNode.hasRobotFile' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode.hasRobotFile')

(view == testbench.projects && viewItem == Project) || (view == testbench.testThemes && (viewItem == TestThemeNode || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForGeneration.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForGeneration.TestThemeNode'))
view == testbench.projects && (viewItem == customRoot.Project || viewItem == customRoot.Version || viewItem == customRoot.Cycle)
view/item/context.title: Reset Custom Root

view/item/context.when: view == testbench.testThemes && (viewItem == 'customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForGeneration.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'MarkedForGeneration.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForImport.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForGeneration.customRoot.TestThemeNode' || viewItem == 'openedFromCycle.MarkedForGeneration.customRoot.TestCaseSetNode')
view/item/context.title: Reset Custom Root

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile
